description: A river in central Morocco that flows from the eastern High Atlas to the Atlantic Ocean.
details: The Barrington Atlas Directory notes: Tensift MOR

history.comment: this place is listed at BAtlas 1a C2 but does not seem to have been imported to Pleiades
